verdict_reasoning: TGOLN2 is a type I TM protein whose canonical and dominant localization is the trans-Golgi network, an endomembrane compartment. Although it cycles through the plasma membrane and endosomal compartments as part of its trafficking and sorting functions, it is not stably resident at the cell surface and the PM transit is transient and incidental to its intracellular trafficking role, not a documented baseline or context-induced surface pool. The protein is endomembrane-resident.
